allow: Bash(python3 -c " import struct, sys for dll in [''EnemyAgents/PlanningAgent_Mine.dll'', ''EnemyAgents/PlanningAgent_Gatherer.dll'', ''EnemyAgents/PlanningAgent_Dummy.dll'']: with open\(dll, ''rb''\) as f: data = f.read\(\) print\(f''{dll}: {len\(data\)} bytes''\) # Show string table snippets - assembly refs for s in [b''AgentSDK'', b''PlanningAgent'', b''netstandard'', b''PlanningAgentBase'']: idx = data.find\(s\) if idx >= 0: print\(f'' Found {s.decode\(\)} at offset {idx}''\) else: print\(f'' NOT FOUND: {s.decode\(\)}''\) print\(\) ")
